text: UAE Digital Dirham launches for retail transactions with cross-border CBDC corridors
Digital Dirham integrates with mBridge network linking Saudi Arabia, India and China
FAB, Emirates NBD, ADCB and Mashreq Bank join Digital Dirham as initial participants
CBUAE Federal Decree-Law expands regulated activities to include open finance services
UAE regulated entities have until September 2026 to reconcile open finance positions
DFSA updates crypto token regulatory framework effective January 12, 2026
UAE CMA issues virtual asset service provider guidelines effective January 2026
SAMA requires PSPs to notify central bank five days before investment rounds
SAMA mandates fundraising disclosure covering timetable, purpose and ownership impact
SAMA updates payment systems oversight framework covering all settlement system operators
